intentSynonyms: look up menu categories in dominos
fetch a single menu categories in dominos
view one specific menu categories in dominos
description: List all menu categories (e.g., Specialty Pizzas, Wings, Desserts, Drinks). Use the category ID with get_category_products to browse items. Optionally scope to a specific store's menu.

store_id.description: Store ID to get store-specific menu categories
